ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employment_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment statistic entry */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the statistics (formatted as 'MMM-YY') */,
  "total" REAL /* Total employment rate for the month */,
  "men_20_over" REAL /* Employment rate for men aged 20 years and over */,
  "women_20_over" REAL /* Employment rate for women aged 20 years and over */,
  "age_16_19" REAL /* Employment rate for 16 to 19 years old */,
  "white" REAL /* Employment rate for White individuals */,
  "black_or_african_american" REAL /* Employment rate for Black or African American individuals */,
  "asian" REAL /* Employment rate for Asian individuals */,
  "hispanic_or_latino" REAL /* Employment rate for Hispanic or Latino individuals */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the statistics are collected */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry or sector related to the employment statistics */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic category */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic category */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population size of the demographic category */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate of the demographic category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "age_range_start" INTEGER /* Start of the age range */,
  "age_range_end" INTEGER /* End of the age range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month (formatted as 'MMM-YY') */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "seasonal_adjustment" REAL /* Seasonal adjustments for the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment rate entry */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistic entry */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic category */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group category */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for the demographic and age group */,
  "employment_rate_change" REAL /* Change in employment rate from the previous period */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the demographic and age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_rates_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_rates_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_rates_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES employment_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_reset_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last password reset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment statistic entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data (e.g., web, API, mobile app) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, laptop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES employment_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, in-app notification) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment statistics entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the statistics */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version update */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the version update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES employment_statistics ("stat_id")
)
